# jsc_idp_connection (Data Source)

Reads the pre-configured IdP connection from a JSC tenant. Returns the first connection found. Use `connection_id` to pass the IdP connection to `jsc_ap` as `oktaconnectionid`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jsc_idp_connection" "idp" {}

resource "jsc_ap" "example" {
  oktaconnectionid = data.jsc_idp_connection.idp.connection_id
  # ... other attributes
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `connection_id` (String) The IdP connection ID. Pass this to jsc_ap as oktaconnectionid.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) The display name of the IdP connection.
- `state` (String) The current state of the IdP connection.
- `type` (String) The connection type, e.g. okta or entra.
